title: Executive Order 7005—Revocation of Executive Order No. 6832, of August 23, 1934, Making Funds Available for Expenses of the National Railroad Adjustment Board
text:
Executive Order No. 6832, of August 23, 1934, making funds available for expenses of the National Railroad Adjustment Board, is hereby revoked.
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
April 10, 1935.
